programs.title: The Nanny Sees All
programs.desc: Grace Anderson's new job as a nanny for the mayor's family turns into a nightmare when a murder rocks the town, and she starts receiving ominous messages. Now, Grace starts to question what deadly secrets are lurking in her hometown.

programs.title: A Nanny to Die For
programs.desc: Sarah desides to go back to work and hires a young woman named Jasmine to help out around the house and with her 13-year-old daughter; while she seems like the perfect nanny, Jasmine has a secret past with Sarah and is determined to ruin this loving family.

programs.title: Don't Open the Door
programs.desc: In a world where danger lurks just beyond the threshold, ordinary people are thrust into nightmares when unexpected guests reveal malevolent motives.

programs.title: Finally Caught
programs.desc: Examine the case of 24-year-old Peggy Gill, who was working the night shift at a Days Inn in Merrillville, Ind., when she was attacked, robbed and murdered; the case goes cold for decades until DNA technology linked her killer to a trail of victims.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: A young police officer discovers the dark secret hidden in a neighborhood restaurant.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: When Erin Chorney disappears, suspicion falls on her ex-boyfriend Michael Bridges, the last person to have seen her; after investigators' searches come up empty-handed, they orchestrate an operation to woo Bridges into confessing her whereabouts.
